events.title: 2025 Standard rotation at Edge of Eternities prerelease

changes.standard: Edge of Eternities prerelease caused Standard rotation for tabletop play.
Secrets of Strixhaven became Standard legal, adding a new Standard-legal set.
changes.pioneer: Secrets of Strixhaven became legal in Pioneer.
changes.modern: Secrets of Strixhaven became legal in Modern.
changes.legacy: Secrets of Strixhaven became legal in Legacy.

changes.pioneer: Cori-Steel Cutter was banned in Pioneer.
changes.modern: Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Lotus Field were banned in Modern; Violent Outburst and Umezawa's Jitte were unbanned.
changes.legacy: Undercity Informer was banned in Legacy.
